title: agrostis pendryi
intro: Agrostis pendryi, also known as bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly found in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Agrostis pendryi include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Agrostis pendryi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
